zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Grendon於1305年11月出生在英國瓦維其可爾格倫登時，她的父親Sir Ralph de Grendon35歲，母親Joan Clinton20歲。她於大約1305年與Philip De Chetwynd結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。她去世於1379年之後在英國斯塔福爾英格斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Grendon于1305年11月出生在英国瓦維其可爾格倫登时，她的父亲Sir Ralph de Grendon35岁，母亲Joan Clinton20岁。她于大约1305年与Philip De Chetwynd结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。她去世于1379年之后在英国斯塔福爾英格斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Grendon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Grendon (in Witheridge and in Tavistock, Devon), Grendon (Northants, Warwicks), Grendon Underwood (Bucks), Grendon Bishop, Grendon Warren (Herefs), or Grindon (Durham, Northumb, Staffs).

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Grendon was born in November 1305, in Grendon, Warwickshire, England, her father, Sir Ralph de Grendon, was 35 and her mother, Joan Clinton, was 20. She married Philip De Chetwynd about 1305. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. She died after 1379, in Ingestre, Staffordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Grendon est née en novembre 1305, à Grendon, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph de Grendon, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan Clinton, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Philip De Chetwynd environ 1305. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Elle est décédée après 1379, à Ingestre, Staffordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Grendon im November 1305 in Grendon, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Ralph de Grendon 35 und ihre Mutter Joan Clinton 20. Sie hat um 1305 Philip De Chetwynd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1379 in Ingestre, Staffordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Grendon è nata il nel novembre 1305 nel Grendon, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Sir Ralph de Grendon, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Joan Clinton, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Philip De Chetwynd circa 1305. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì dopo il 1379, nel Ingestre, Staffordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Grendonが1305年11月にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアグレンドンで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph de Grendonは35歳，母Joan Clintonは20歳であった。約1305年にPhilip De Chetwyndと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼女は1379年以後にイギリススタフォードシュアイアインジェストアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Grendon(이)가 1305년 11월 영국 워윅실르 그렌던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Ralph de Grendon(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Clinton(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1305년 Philip De Chetwynd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1379년 이후 영국 스태퍼드실르 잉스트르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Grendon nasceu em novembro de 1305, em Grendon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph de Grendon, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan Clinton, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip De Chetwynd aproximadamente 1305. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ela faleceu após 1379, em Ingestre, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Grendon родилась ноябрь 1305 г. в местности грендон, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Ralph de Grendon было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Clinton, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip De Chetwynd около 1305 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Она умерла после 1379 г. в местности ингестр, стаффордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Grendon nació en noviembre de 1305, en Grendon, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph de Grendon, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joan Clinton, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Philip De Chetwynd aproximadamente 1305. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió después de 1379, en Ingestre, Staffordshire, Inglaterra.
